items.text: Please note: If you would like to track the status of this request in your User Dashboard, please sign in (before filling out this request) or Register first if you have not yet created an account. Thank you!

items.html: If you have an account, please login. If you are applying for a service project, you MUST create an account first. Please create an account here.

items.text:
Transportation Eligibility

Schools (Alameda or Contra Costa counties schools ONLY)

At least 50% of the school's students must be on the current Free or Reduced Price Meals (FRPM) list, published on the California Department of Education's website. Please click THIS LINK to check your school's FRPM %.

Non-profit Organizations and Government Agencies

501(c)(3) status non-profit organizations and area municipalities that serve groups of Alameda or Contra Costa children from low-income families, seniors, or people with disabilities are eligible to apply.

NOTE: Proof of 501(c)(3) status is required.

General Requirements

There is a 25 passenger minimum to qualify for the Parks Express Low Cost Transportation program, and a discounted fee of $120.00 per vehicle.

For additional information on the Parks Express Low Cost Program, please click HERE

Fee-related program. Residents: $200; Non-residents $220. Only offered to one class per day, Maximum 35 students; two classes cannot be combined.  Each class teacher must submit separate application form. Only choose this program if you can stay 9:30am to 2:30pm. Offered to 4th grade and up (3rd graders in spring only)

options.value: Virtual Leave No Trace Awareness Workshop
options.label: Virtual Leave No Trace Awareness Workshop

items.text:
Age Requirements:
Canoeing or Kayaking on lakes: 8 years and above
Canoeing or Kayaking in tidal waterways: 11 years and above
Join Outdoor Recreation in an interactive virtual exploration series of the seven Leave No Trace principles. Suggested age: 8 & up.

displayIf.value: Virtual Leave No Trace Awareness Workshop

items.text:
Age Requirements:
Ages 7 years and above.
Participants 16 years and above require a fishing license at all lakes and pier and shoreline locations that require one

Age Requirements:
Participants must know how to ride a bike and be 4'11'' and up

We aim to make our programs affordable and accessible to all East Bay communities. Many groups are eligible for discounts. We have the following discounts available:

  • Out-of-District group: no discount
  • Private Group: no discount
  • Private School: no discount
  • Municipal agency: 50% off
  • 501(c)3 non-profit: 50% off
  • Public School with >25% FRPM: 25% off
  • Public School with >50% FRPM: 50% off
  • Public School with >75% FRPM: 75% off
Use the above information to fill out the following fields:
